name: Agotogi
description:
**First Appearance:** Chapter 163; Episode 100

Agotogi was the leader of the gang who tried to kidnap Vivi in the Vivi and Kohza Flashback. Young Kohza tried to fight him off but failed, and ended up getting a scar in the process. Agotogi almost kidnapped Vivi only to find himself kicked in the face by Cobra, Vivi's father. He was arrested and never seen again.

(Source: One Piece Wikia)
